page.subtitle: Demo
page.intro: Pick a restaurant and a profile to explore the full app. Data is pre-filled, no password required.

chezReno.name: Chez Reno
chezReno.subtitle: Simple
chezReno.manager: Full view: schedule, team, hours, payroll, compliance, preferences.
chezReno.worker: Employee view: my schedule, my hours, replacements, time off.

grandBrasserie.name: The Grand Brasserie
grandBrasserie.subtitle: Complex
grandBrasserie.description: 42 employees · 3 zones (Split/Lunch/Dinner) · Leave reinforcements · Medical mode
grandBrasserie.manager: Full view: complex schedule, multiple profiles, employee preferences.

monRestaurant.name: My restaurant
monRestaurant.subtitle: Empty
monRestaurant.description: No employees, no shifts — to walk through the onboarding funnel from scratch
monRestaurant.manager: Start the initial setup: profile, sub-roles, team, shifts, schedule.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Demo
whatsapp.intro: Try the WhatsApp bot with three different profiles. The manager runs the schedule, employees check their shifts and can flag an unavailability (the manager then finds a replacement).

phone.emptyHint: Send a message to get started

suggestions.workerA: When am I working this week?
suggestions.workerC: I want to request time off
